title: Update app title to SITUATION MONITOR RADIO

requirements.text: Update the app title displayed in the header to read 'SITUATION MONITOR RADIO' in all places where the app name appears (AppHeader.tsx, page title, and any other visible instances).

quotes: It should say situation monitor radio then we take it live
updating the title to SITUATION MONITOR RADIO

acceptanceCriteria: The AppHeader displays 'SITUATION MONITOR RADIO' as the app title
No other app name variants (e.g., 'Squadron Radio') appear anywhere in the UI
The browser tab title (document title / index.html) also reflects 'SITUATION MONITOR RADIO'

nonGoals: Changing any visual styling or layout beyond the title text
